MASTER Global Robotic Net ( Lipunov et al., "MASTER Global Robotic Net",Advances in Astronomy, 2010, 30L )
started HAWC alert 200815.26 (Ttrigger=2020-08-15 06:20:17UT, Tnotice=2020-08-15 06:21:34UT)
observations 92s after notice time at 2020-08-15 06:23:06UT
at altitude 42 deg  (sun  altitude -60deg) with unfiltered upper limit 20.0m.
Observations and analysis will be continued.

The cover map is (and far information will be) available at 
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/event.php?id=1420231
